grc_control_coverage.SOC 2 CC6.1: Logical access controls — orphaned accounts and attribute drift
grc_control_coverage.SOC 2 CC6.2: Access provisioning — joiner gaps and manager assignment
grc_control_coverage.SOC 2 CC6.3: Access removal — leaver failures and inactive account state

findings.title: Terminated employee account in ou=inactive is not locked
findings.detail: Oliver Bennett (empid 1006) is in ou=inactive but nsAccountLock is not set to true
findings.remediation: Set nsAccountLock=true on account — account should be locked when moved to inactive OU

findings.title: Employee is assigned as their own manager
findings.detail: Sophie Müller (empid 1001) is assigned as their own manager (manager empid = 1001) — verify this is a top-level manager
findings.remediation: Verify this is intentional (top-level manager) — if not, update HR source with correct manager empid

findings.title: Employee is assigned as their own manager
findings.detail: Thomas Weber (empid 1004) is assigned as their own manager (manager empid = 1004) — verify this is a top-level manager
findings.remediation: Verify this is intentional (top-level manager) — if not, update HR source with correct manager empid

findings.title: Employee has no manager assigned in HR source
findings.detail: Franken Stein (empid 1008) has no manager assigned in HR — access certification reviews cannot be automatically assigned
findings.remediation: Update HR source with manager empid — required for access certification reviewer assignment
